summary: Mexico beat South Africa 2-0, with J. Quiñones (9') and R. Jiménez (67') scoring. South Korea won 2-1 against Czechia. L. Krejcí scored for Czechia (59'), but South Korea responded with goals from H. In-Beom (67') and O. Hyeon-Gyu (80') to claim victory.

Canada drew 1-1 with Bosnia-Herzegovina; J. Lukic scored for Bosnia-Herzegovina, C. Larin for Canada. The United States beat Paraguay 4-1, with F. Balogun (twice), D. Bobadilla, and G. Reyna scoring. Maurício netted for Paraguay.

Today's World Cup action saw Qatar draw 1-1 with Switzerland, with M. Muheim scoring late for Qatar. Brazil and Morocco also shared a 1-1 draw, I. Saibari netting for Morocco and Vinícius Júnior for Brazil. Scotland secured a 1-0 victory over Haiti, thanks to J. McGinn's goal. Mexico, South Africa, Switzerland, Canada, Brazil, Morocco, Norway, France, and Colombia are mathematically qualified. Czechia, Qatar, Haiti, Tunisia, Senegal, Iraq, Jordan, Uzbekistan, and Panama are eliminated.

Australia defeated Türkiye 2-0 (Irankunda, Metcalfe). Germany secured a dominant 7-1 victory over Curaçao, with six different scorers. Netherlands and Japan drew 2-2. Ivory Coast edged Ecuador 1-0 (Diallo). Sweden triumphed 5-1 against Tunisia, featuring a brace from Y. Ayari. Mexico, USA, Germany, and Argentina are among twelve teams mathematically qualified. Twelve teams, including Türkiye and Tunisia, are now eliminated.

Today's World Cup results: Spain 0-0 Cape Verde. Belgium 1-1 Egypt (E. Ashour, M. Hany). Saudi Arabia 1-1 Uruguay (A. Al-Amri, M. Araújo). Iran and New Zealand drew 2-2, E. Just scoring twice for NZL, R. Rezaeian and M. Mohebbi for IRN.

France beat Senegal 3-1, with K. Mbappé scoring twice. Norway defeated Iraq 4-1, E. Haaland netting two goals. Lionel Messi's hat-trick secured Argentina a 3-0 victory over Algeria. B. Barcola, I. Mbaye, L. Østigard, and A. Hussein also scored. Mexico, South Africa, Switzerland, Canada, Brazil, and Morocco have mathematically qualified. South Korea, Czechia, Qatar, Scotland, and Haiti are mathematically eliminated.

Austria defeated Jordan 3-1 (R. Schmid, Y. Al-Arab). Portugal drew 1-1 with Congo DR (J. Neves, Y. Wissa). England beat Croatia 4-2, with Kane, Bellingham, Rashford scoring. Ghana edged Panama 1-0 (C. Yirenkyi). Colombia triumphed 3-1 over Uzbekistan (Muñoz, Díaz, Campaz). Eleven teams, including Mexico, Brazil, France, Colombia, and England, have mathematically qualified. Ten teams, including Czechia, Qatar, Haiti, and Panama, are eliminated.

World Cup results saw Czechia draw 1-1 with South Africa, M. Sadílek scoring. Switzerland beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 4-1, with J. Manzambi scoring twice. Canada thrashed Qatar 6-0, featuring a J. David hat-trick. Mexico secured a 1-0 win against South Korea, L. Romo scoring. Mexico, South Africa, Switzerland, Canada, Brazil, and Morocco have all mathematically qualified for the knockouts. South Korea, Czechia, Qatar, Scotland, and Haiti are mathematically eliminated.

The United States beat Australia 2-0, with goals from C. Burgess and A. Freeman. Morocco secured a 1-0 victory over Scotland, I. Saibari scoring. Brazil dominated Haiti 3-0, M. Cunha netting twice and Vinícius Júnior once. Paraguay edged Türkiye 1-0, M. Galarza scoring.
progression: Australia has secured automatic qualification for the knockout stages by finishing second in Group D.

summary: The Netherlands defeated Sweden 5–1, with B. Brobbey and C. Gakpo both scoring twice, and C. Summerville adding a goal. A. Elanga scored for Sweden. Germany beat Ivory Coast 2–1, D. Undav scoring twice after F. Kessié's opener. Ecuador and Curaçao played to a 0–0 draw. Mexico, South Africa, Switzerland, Canada, Brazil, and Morocco have mathematically qualified for the knockouts. Czechia, South Korea, Qatar, Scotland, and Haiti are mathematically eliminated.

Japan secured a dominant 4-0 victory over Tunisia, with Ayase Ueda scoring twice. Spain also won convincingly, beating Saudi Arabia 4-0, featuring a brace from Mikel Oyarzabal. Belgium and Iran played out a goalless draw. Uruguay and Cape Verde shared the points in a 2-2 draw, while Egypt defeated New Zealand 3-1.
progression: Japan, Spain, Egypt, and Belgium have all secured their places in the knockout stages. Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia and New Zealand are mathematically eliminated from the competition.

summary: Lionel Messi scored twice as Argentina beat Austria 2-0. Kylian Mbappé also netted a brace, with Ousmane Dembélé adding another, in France's 3-0 victory over Iraq. Erling Haaland's two goals helped Norway to a 3-2 win against Senegal, while Algeria defeated Jordan 2-1.
progression: As a result of today's victories, Norway, France, and Argentina have all confirmed their places in the knockout stage.

summary: Portugal thrashed Uzbekistan 5-0, with C. Ronaldo scoring twice, alongside goals from N. Mendes, A. Nematov, and R. Leão. England and Ghana drew 0-0. Croatia defeated Panama 1-0, A. Budimir scoring. Colombia secured a 1-0 win against Congo DR, with D. Muñoz finding the net.
progression: Colombia confirmed their place in the knockout stage after securing a 1-0 victory over Congo DR, guaranteeing a top-two finish in Group K.

summary: Bosnia-Herzegovina defeated Qatar 3-1. Switzerland beat Canada 2-1. Morocco secured a 4-2 victory over Haiti. Brazil dominated Scotland 3-0, with Vinícius Júnior scoring twice. Mexico won 3-0 against Czechia, and South Africa edged South Korea 1-0 thanks to T. Maseko's goal.

Ivory Coast defeated Curaçao 2-0 with two goals from Nicolas Pépé. Ecuador beat Germany 2-1, while Japan and Sweden drew 1-1. Netherlands secured a 3-1 victory over Tunisia. Paraguay and Australia drew 0-0. Türkiye dramatically edged past United States 3-2.
progression: Paraguay, Ivory Coast, Netherlands, and Japan all secured their places in the knockout stage. Meanwhile, Türkiye, Curaçao, and Tunisia were eliminated from the competition.
